title: RCA category summary drill-down with evidence and score-results filtering

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: add representative evidence rendering in category summaries, category-level View items filter + clear control, mutual exclusivity with topic filter, filtered-status chips, and docs/test updates.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented category-summary drill-down in EvaluationTask: representative evidence rows per category, View-items category filter into score results via selectedItemIds, topic/category mutual exclusivity, clear-category-filter control, active filter status chip, and missing-item-id notes. Updated TopicList callback to include topic label for topic filter chip. Added docs section for inspecting specifics and added tests: topic-list callback signature + new EvaluationTask category-filter test. Targeted tests passed: topic-list, EvaluationTask.category-filter, EvaluationTask.memo.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed in commit 21e2db286. Added category-summary representative evidence + View-items filtering into score results, topic/category mutual exclusivity with active filter chip, docs update for drill-down usage, and targeted tests passing.
